title: Add support for make vendor-in-container
body:
Certain versions of go have different vendoring capabilities.
We want to make sure that vendoring the the vendor checker are
running with the same version of golang.  We do this by using
podman to run a container of the latest golang container image.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: Out of curiosity. Are we planning to ditch the remaining Travis jobs or do we need them for a specific reason?
I want to talk to @nalind about it.  Make sure we have all of the tests running on all the platforms in Cirrus.
LGTM, would like a @cevich head nod and a @nalind one if he's time.
